title: the place/time/reason + where/when/why + S + V

formulas.zh: 名詞（地點/時間/原因）+ 關係副詞（where/when/why）+ 主詞 + 動詞
名詞（地點/時間/原因）+ 介系詞 + which + 主詞 + 動詞（改寫形式）

explanation: 關係副詞 where、when、why 引導形容詞子句，修飾先行詞為地點、時間或原因的名詞。where 修飾地點、when 修飾時間、why 修飾原因，子句提供額外資訊。此句型可改寫為「介系詞 + which」的形式：where = in/at + which；when = in/during + which；why = for which。掌握先行詞性質是關鍵，避免混淆關係代名詞與關係副詞用法。

examples.eng: This is the museum where we saw the ancient artifacts last month.
examples.chi: 這是我們上個月看到古代文物的博物館。

examples.eng: The summer when I traveled to Japan was unforgettable and exciting.
examples.chi: 我去日本旅遊的那個夏天是難忘且令人興奮的。

examples.eng: The main reason why she quit her job was the lack of work-life balance.
examples.chi: 她辭去工作的主要原因是缺乏工作與生活的平衡。

examples.eng: This is the restaurant where I had my first date, which holds special memories.
examples.chi: 這是我第一次約會的餐廳，它承載著特殊的回憶。

extension.tip: 區分關係副詞與關係代名詞：where/when/why 引導子句修飾名詞時，先行詞是地點/時間/原因；若先行詞是人或物，應使用 who/that/which。判斷法：先行詞可代入「介系詞 + which」時，使用關係副詞。

examples.test: ✗ The place which we visited was beautiful. / ✓ The place where we visited was beautiful.
examples.result: → 先行詞 place 是地點，應用 where 而非 which，或用 that/which + 完整動詞短語

examples.test: ✓ The year when he was born was 1995. / ✓ The year in which he was born was 1995.
examples.result: → when 可改寫為 in which；兩種用法均正確

examples.test: ✓ The reason why she left was unclear. / ✓ The reason for which she left was unclear.
examples.result: → why 可改寫為 for which；正式文章多用 for which

extension.note: 記住三個關係副詞：where（地點）、when（時間）、why（原因），可全部改寫為「介系詞 + which」形式。

parts: I spent my childhood is now being renovated.
exercises.sentence: The school where I spent my childhood is now being renovated.
exercises.translation: 我度過童年的那所學校現在正在整修。

parts: we first met was the beginning of our friendship.
exercises.sentence: The day when we first met was the beginning of our friendship.
exercises.translation: 我們初次相識的那天是友誼的開始。

parts: he refused such an excellent opportunity.
exercises.sentence: I cannot understand the reason why he refused such an excellent opportunity.
exercises.translation: 我無法理解他拒絕這麼好的機會的原因。

parts: the meeting took place was too crowded and uncomfortable.
exercises.sentence: The conference room where the meeting took place was too crowded and uncomfortable.
exercises.translation: 會議舉行的會議室太擁擠且不舒適。
